subheadline: Demo awards from fictional juries — but every feature they cite ships today: runtime theming, audit-clean templates, WCAG 2.2-checked presets, and backend previews on all 244 elements.

image.title: Desiderio backend previews in the page module
image.alternative: TYPO3 page module rendering rich backend previews of Desiderio content elements.
image.description: Screenshot of the TYPO3 backend with Desiderio installed.

image.title: Desiderio new-content wizard
image.alternative: TYPO3 new content element wizard listing all 10 Desiderio element groups.
image.description: Screenshot of the TYPO3 backend with Desiderio installed.

image.title: Desiderio hero page in the Lagoon preset
image.alternative: Desiderio frontend hero page in the Lagoon preset with WCAG 2.2-checked contrast.
image.description: Screenshot of a Desiderio frontend page from the seeded styleguide.

image.title: Desiderio theme preset site settings
